slides.headline: Power the Future with Solar Energy
slides.description: We supply high-efficiency solar modules from the world's leading manufacturers, delivering clean energy solutions to over 50 countries.

slides.headline: Trusted by Global Partners
slides.description: With 5,000m² warehouse and direct factory partnerships, we ensure stable supply and competitive pricing for every project.

slides.headline: Complete Solar Solutions
slides.description: One-stop procurement for residential, commercial, and utility-scale solar projects. Technical support included.

slides.headline: Quality You Can Count On
slides.description: Every product we supply comes with full manufacturer warranty and our dedicated after-sales service team.

about.title: SunVolt Energy
about.description: SunVolt Energy is a professional solar product supplier based in Wuxi, China. We specialize in providing high-quality solar panels and inverters from the world's leading manufacturers including Jinko Solar, LONGi, JA Solar, Trina Solar, and Canadian Solar. With years of industry experience, we serve clients across Africa, Southeast Asia, the Middle East, and South America.
highlights: Direct factory supply with competitive pricing
Full technical support and after-sales service

items.title: Residential Solar
items.description: Complete home solar systems with compact panels and hybrid inverters, designed for energy independence and lower electricity bills.

items.title: Commercial Solar
items.description: Rooftop and ground-mounted systems for businesses, factories, and warehouses. Reduce operating costs with clean energy.

items.title: Utility-Scale Solar
items.description: Large-scale solar farm solutions with high-power modules and advanced tracking systems for maximum energy yield.

footer.description: Professional solar panel supplier providing high-quality photovoltaic modules from top-tier manufacturers. Serving customers worldwide with reliable products and excellent service.
